goal: agno-relay Launch Plan - Rename, build demo kit, prepare launch assets, and ship

tasks.title: Rename package to agno-relay
tasks.description: Update package.json: name to 'agno-relay', bin to 'agno-relay': './dist/cli.js'. Update src/cli.ts branding. Update all README references from 'agno' to 'agno-relay', 'npx agno' to 'npx agno-relay'

tasks.title: Add disambiguation to README
tasks.description: Add at very top of README before title: '> **Note**: This project is unrelated to [agno-agi/agno](https://github.com/agno-agi/agno) (Python agent framework).'

tasks.title: GitHub repo rename + metadata
tasks.description: HUMAN: In GitHub Settings, rename repo to 'agno-relay'. Add description: 'Reliability bridge: MCP → OpenAI tools with canonical errors, safe retries, pagination normalization'. Add topics: mcp, openai-tools, llm-agents, ai-agents, protocol-bridge, reliability, tool-calling

tasks.title: npm publish
tasks.description: HUMAN: Run 'npm login' if needed, then 'npm publish --access public'. Verify with 'npx agno-relay --help'

tasks.title: Create GitHub release v0.1.0
tasks.description: HUMAN: Create GitHub release with tag v0.1.0, title 'Initial release', body from README Features section

tasks.title: Build mock MCP server
tasks.description: Create examples/mock-mcp/server.js - Express server ~150 lines supporting: list_repos with pagination (3 items first call, 2 more second call), create_issue mutation with idempotency tracking, error simulation endpoints (?error=401|403|429|502|503|504), Retry-After header for 429, X-Idempotency-Key tracking

tasks.title: Add agno-relay demo command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/demo.ts: Start mock MCP server on port 3000, start bridge pointing to localhost:3000, log both endpoints with capabilities summary, show curl example, keep alive until Ctrl+C. Wire into CLI

tasks.title: Create curl example scripts
tasks.description: Create examples/curl/ with executable scripts: 01-list-repos.sh (basic tool call), 02-pagination.sh (two calls with cursor), 03-rate-limit.sh (trigger 429), 04-transient.sh (trigger 502), 05-idempotency.sh (mutation with retry). Each with comments and jq formatting

tasks.title: Update README with demo section
tasks.description: Add 'Try it in 60 seconds' section after Quick Start showing npx agno-relay demo and curl examples

tasks.title: Add 'Why this exists' section to README
tasks.description: Add section after demo explaining: inconsistent errors, varying pagination, dangerous retries without idempotency. How agno-relay fixes each with canonical errors, safe retries, normalized pagination

tasks.title: Create launch assets directory
tasks.description: Create launch/ directory with: twitter-thread.md (10-tweet thread), hn-post.md (Show HN post), checklist.md (launch day checklist)

tasks.title: Record demo video
tasks.description: HUMAN: Setup clean terminal (dark theme, 16-18px font, ~100 chars wide). Record 80-second demo per script: hook, start demo, success call, pagination, rate limit, idempotency, conformance report, CTA. Export as GIF (<15MB) and MP4 (720p/1080p)

tasks.title: Add demo GIF to README
tasks.description: Create assets/ directory, add demo.gif, update README with Demo section showing GIF and link to full video

tasks.title: Launch day execution
tasks.description: HUMAN: Post X thread (T-30min), submit HN Show HN (T+0), post r/LocalLLaMA (T+15min), post r/MachineLearning (T+30min), Anthropic Discord (T+45min), LangChain Discord (T+60min), DM 5 agent builders (T+90min). Respond to all comments within 2 hours

tasks.title: Create FEEDBACK.md for post-launch
tasks.description: Create FEEDBACK.md in repo root with sections: Feature requests, Bugs reported, Praise (for social proof)
